body:
You have my promise. I will fight for you. |

Peter, I am with you. I will fight for you. And I will win for you. This is my solemn pledge. But I can’t do it alone. I am humbly asking for your pledge of support to ensure me and Mike Pence take back the White House this November. Pledge your support to elect the Trump-Pence ticket with a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, or $15 now. As we enter the final two months of this election, we need the pledged support of EVERY single one of our supporters. Peter, you are the rock of this campaign. Without you, we never would’ve won the primary. And without you, we will not win again in November. Which is why I’m turning to you first. Unless we have the pledged commitment from our strongest supporters, we will not win over the hearts and minds of independent and undecided voters. And just like we brought so many new Republican voters into our Party, we will do the same in the general election. Believe me, it will happen. I will fight to ensure that every American is treated equally, protected equally, and honored equally. We will reject bigotry and hatred and oppression in all of its forms, and seek a new future of security, prosperity, and opportunity. Our message is the winning message. Our platform is America’s platform. Now please pledge your support to be there for me, Mike Pence, and the future of America on November 8 with a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, or $15. Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. Trump

name: Hillary for Virginia
subject: Complete your volunteer profile, Peter!
body:
| Peter -- Thank you for being a committed supporter of this campaign -- you play a very important role in making sure Hillary and other Democrats are victorious this November.

However, our records indicate that your supporter profile is not complete. Here’s what we have on file for you:

**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**PHONE NUMBER:** N/A
**STATUS:** Supporter

Peter, will you complete your supporter profile? Having a complete profile means you’ll stay up to date on campaign updates, be the first to know when Hillary is in Virginia, and be connected to your local organizer.

**It’s easy and will only take a few minutes:**

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYyOTU1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMTE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary for Virginia

| **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyOTU1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMTE2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjYyOTU1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMTE2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYyOTU1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMTE2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYyOTU1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMTE2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYyOTU1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMTE2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjYyOTU1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMTE2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYyOTU1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMTE2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjYyOTU1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMTE2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjYyOTU1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMTE2S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYyOTU1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMTE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYyOTU1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMTE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

**We're coming up on our make-or-break pre-primary FEC deadline -- the biggest of the campaign so far -- and the latest poll shows our lead has evaporated.**
Right-wing groups, including ones tied to the Koch Brothers, Mitch McConnell, and Karl Rove, have spent $24 million against Governor Maggie Hassan. And with this recent dip in the polls, it looks like they're going to spend even more to try to take the lead.
**Grassroots supporters like you are our best shot at bouncing back in the fight to elect Maggie and take back the Senate.**[Please, give $3 or whatever makes sense for you so that together, we can hit our $75,000 goal by Wednesday's pre-primary fundraising deadline.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd799/2a380d31/11ee7163/fa40d4/3558607182/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwODIxYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160821am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")****
Poll after poll shows Maggie locked in a dead heat with Trump's endorsed candidate, Kelly Ayotte. That's why we need you to step up right now and help us hit our goal before this critical FEC deadline. In a race as tight as this one, your gift could be the difference between winning in New Hampshire and taking back the Democratic Senate, and handing the future of the Supreme Court to Republicans like Trump and Ayotte.
Unlike Ayotte, we don't rely on corporate special interests and conservative mega-donors like Mitch McConnell and the Koch Brothers to fund our campaign. **We rely on grassroots supporters like you, team.****[That's why we're asking you to please donate, before Wednesday's big FEC deadline, so that we can win here in New Hampshire, take back the Senate, and protect the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd799/2a380d31/11ee7163/fa40d4/3558607182/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwODIxYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160821am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Our numbers are dipping, Peter
body:
We need to do this today. | Let’s talk about the state of the campaign, Peter.

Our poll numbers are holding steady, which is good. We're growing our field organization, building out neighborhood teams in communities all over the country -- which is even better.

But that's happening at a time when our fundraising levels are, frankly, dipping. It seems that with our convention in the rearview mirror and pundits constantly saying that “momentum” is on our side, a lot of people believe that we have this locked up and that donations don’t matter anymore.

Peter, that’s how elections are lost. We have to remind ourselves that it’s only August -- and that Donald Trump has more than enough time to find his way to a win by November. After all, he’s already raising nearly as much money as we are and may even pull ahead in the weeks to come.

You’ve already done a ton to help us out. I know that, and Hillary knows that. But if we’re going to win this thing in 79 days, we need to up our fundraising game. Today.

**[Can we count on you to chip in now and claim your free Team Hillary sticker? We don’t want to see what’ll happen on Election Day if our fundraising numbers continue to slide.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYyOTc4NjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjczMjg5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

A dollar now means so much more than a dollar in October or November. A donation now means another organizer in the field. It means another ad on TV. And it means another Get Out the Vote event in a battleground state in the final stretch of the race.

**So please, can you help us out? It would mean a lot:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyOTc4NjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjczMjg5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

body:
| Peter --

While Ted Strickland made two public appearances this week, Rob, Jane, and Sally made more than 30 stops all over Ohio on the first week of Rob's 50-stop "Moving Ohio Forward" Summer RV Tour!

Our many stops this week included events in Cincinnati, Dayton, Columbus, Toledo, Lima, Mayfield Heights, Akron, Powell, Cambridge, Zanesville, Delaware, and many more. Here's a look at the tour so far:

Ted Strickland and his out-of-state allies have already spent $15 million on false ads attacking Rob, but we will outwork them. Our incredible volunteers have contacted more than 3.3 million voters and we're just getting started!

We hope to see you soon!

Sincerely,

body:
Dear Peter,

When I decided to run for governor, I knew the career politicians and the liberal media would attack me with everything they have.

So when I saw their [new line of attacks](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=8dc6baf929&e=84041254e6) on my humanitarian work, I was not surprised.

**[I need your help to fight back](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=9057c458e3&e=84041254e6)**. Chris Koster has $8 million more than us right now, and their attacks will only increase. _We need to be able to combat these false attacks._

On this ridiculous attack, let me be clear: I'm proud of my work with Bosnian Refugees, and no desperate political attack will ever change the work we did to help make a difference.
**Help us take Missouri in a New Direction:
[Quick Donate >> $25](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=789f4619b6&e=84041254e6)
[Quick Donate >> $50](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=974115b3df&e=84041254e6)
[Quick Donate >> $100](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=b20b076d07&e=84041254e6)**

or donate any amount you can: **[https://donate.ericgreitens.com/victory](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=421802035a&e=84041254e6)**

At the same time I was in the Balkans working to help refugees, Chris Koster was working to launch his political career.

With your help, his decades as a career politician will come to an end in November.

Best,
Eric

St. Louis, Missouri 63108

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: the danger in falling behind
body:
Trump's new ad | Peter --

We’ve been saying for weeks that there’s a danger in falling behind in our fundraising goals.

Now we have a concrete example why.

Donald Trump is pouring $5 million into an attack ad that will run in Florida, Ohio, North Carolina, and Pennsylvania every day between now and the end of the month.

This ad is a real piece of work.

The very first line insinuates Hillary is rigging the election. And that might be the high point.

It’s the kind of thing that begs for an immediate response from our campaign.

But because of where we are in our fundraising, doing so is going to require that we make some difficult choices and put off some other things we were planning to prioritize.

Unless we can count on you to step up right now.

Every day between now and August 31st, we need to raise a little more than our forecast is currently projecting. If day by day, we can boost what we bring in by as little as 15 or 17 percent, I’ll feel much more confident heading into September.

So, I’m going to be completely honest. We need you, and we need you today -- that’s all there is to it.

**Will you donate and get your free sticker right now?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYyOTgzOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjkxMzc1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

| Hi -- So, Marco Rubio says Donald Trump is a dangerous lunatic and a "con man," who should also be our commander in chief. He's trying to play a game where he endorses Donald Trump but still stands by these insults. I call it his "Donald dance," and it's getting more and more ridiculous every day.

His lack of courage to stand up and do what's right by un-endorsing Trump couldn't be more clear. But he doesn't care. He's just in this to better his own political career.

**It 's wrong, and it's against everything Patrick and our campaign stand for. Patrick will fight for Florida families, while Rubio only fights for himself.**

But right now the polls are too close to call, and we know the GOP is going to outspend us. So we're counting on your help.
